reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio en un lugar estratégico de Buenos Aires.  No hace falta ser socio para que lo atiendan bien.  Precios de referencia.  Predio muy moderno, ordenado, limpio, con todos los servicios indispensables para el automóvil.  Combustibles, GNC, aire, baños, estacionamiento, fastfood, todo bien distribuido y custodiados por personal de seguridad.  Aceptan todos los medios de pago y los playeros son muy cordiales, atentos y serviciales. Un ejemplo a imitar.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service in a strategic location in Buenos Aires. You don't need to be a member to receive good service. Prices are reasonable. The facility is very modern, organized, and clean, with all the essential services for your car. Fuel, CNG, air conditioning, restrooms, parking, and fast food are all well-distributed and monitored by security personnel. They accept all forms of payment, and the attendants are very friendly, attentive, and helpful. A model to follow.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Claudio!
